message:
feat: map reasoning_effort to Anthropic thinking parameter

Anthropic's extended thinking is controlled via a `thinking` body
parameter with `type: "enabled"` and `budget_tokens`. This maps the
unified `reasoning_effort` field (low/medium/high) to budget values
(1024/8192/32768) matching the Google adapter's approach. Effort
"none" or unrecognized values produce no thinking parameter.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
